snippet.title: ДҗOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvrЕЎni producent: Дҗ. ДҗOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
рҹҺ§ BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ДҗOGANI: 

рҹ“І  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
рҹ“© djogani.djole@gmail.com

рҹ‘ү Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/вҖӢ 
рҹ‘ү Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupaвҖӢ 
рҹ‘ү Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesnaвҖӢ 

Subscribe to Channel Дҗogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaДҗOGANIofficial
UkljuДҚi рҹ”” da dobijaЕЎ obaveЕЎtenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuДҮi cele noДҮi maskiran
Svetom vlada ДҚudna epidemija
ДҢekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piЕЎe LOCK DOWN,
VidiЕЎ na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ДҚini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ДҚekamo
Da me grliЕЎ hoДҮu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluЕЎaj malo doktore na vestima
Е ta ДҮe dalje biti baЕЎ me zanima
ДҢekaj, hani, hani, da proД‘u ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoЕЎ samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reДҚ
PuniДҚemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeДҚ.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Дҗole Дҗogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ЕЎto smo sami,
Ne moЕҫemo vani
Zato doД‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaЕЎ mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
рҹҺө Antonu
рҹҺө Marku D.
рҹҺө ЕҪiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZABRANJENO je reupload-ovati na svoj liДҚni kanal zbog krЕЎenja autorskih prava i kvarenja zvuka i nepotrebnog gomilanja na YouTube-u! Svako kaДҚenje Video spota na YouTube, biДҮe prijavljeno YouTube administratorima. Sva autorska i izvoД‘aДҚka prava su zaЕЎtiДҮena.

snippet.title: Voyage: ЕҪelim da mi Breskvica ostane u lepom seДҮanju. | NETKULTURNO | S01EP65
snippet.description:
Voyage je iskreno priДҚao o novom albumu, o trenucima nakon raskida sa Breskvicom, o novoj ljubavi, o inostranim saradnjama i svemu onome ЕЎto do sada niste ДҚuli Kontrakulturna i Voyage priДҚaju izolovani od buke, u Vili Suburbia. Spremite se za lekcije, teme koje ДҮe vas rasplakati i ponovni susret sa Voyageom u emisiji Netkutlurno.

#netkulturno #voyage #mondoportal

Mondo Guglali Smo playlist рҹ‘ү https://bit.ly/MondoGuglaliSmoPlaylist

U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s ModriДҮem, Е ukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopДҮe bivЕЎi igraДҚi, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, ЕЎto kaЕҫe za sluДҚaj Majana DabiДҮa, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek poДҚetak? snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviДҮ iz Golubinje kod ЕҪepДҚa poznat je po tome ЕЎto je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiДҚku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. MeД‘utim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuДҮe, zemljiЕЎta,  ЕЎume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuДҮe i imanja. Danas sadi voДҮe, uzgaja ovce, kokoЕЎi. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima poloЕҫen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte priДҚu koja vas moЕҫe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviДҮ from Golubinja near ЕҪepДҚe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEЕ KE PREДҗU 15km ZAJEDNO:TeЕЎka Еҫivotna priДҚa devojДҚice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala вҖһ300 ДҚudaвҖң donela je zanimljive priДҚe o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaЕҫu uzalud da je pas najbolji ДҚovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moЕҫe da se meri ni sa ДҚim.  U KurЕЎumlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreДҮe peЕЎke put ЕЎkole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peЕЎaДҚiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiЕЎi do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuДҮe. Autobusom stiЕҫe do ЕЎkole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeЕЎaДҚi u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ДҚeka keruЕЎa Lara.

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moЕҫete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priДҚe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priДҚa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaЕЎa ДҚiji postupci se i dan danas prepriДҚavaju. Na ДҚelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Еҫestokih momaka sa naЕЎih prostora, zaДҚetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaЕЎ, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. PraviДҚan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reЕЎavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anД‘eo ДҚuvar dok je za ove druge bio noДҮna mora, a gnev i jaДҚinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliДҚno pamtili. ЕҪivotni put Ljubomira MagaЕЎa i druЕҫine koju je okupio oko sebe, moЕҫe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriЕҫnih deДҚaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovДҚega. SaznaДҮemo na koje sve skrivene i javne naДҚine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaД‘aja iz njegovog Еҫivota. ДҢuДҮemo i svedoДҚanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiДҚkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naЕЎ sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se

Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest

snippet.title: Na veДҚeri kod: Bojan VaskoviДҮ / sezona 2 / ep7
snippet.description:
SledeДҮi domaДҮin tima So koji ДҮe u svom domu ugostiti ekipu Biber je Bojan VaskoviДҮ, frontmen jednog od najpopularnijih bendova domaДҮe muziДҚke scene - "Lexington".
Ovaj roД‘eni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinuД‘en da napusti rodni grad i ЕЎta je sve proЕЎao dok se nije skuДҮio u prestonici. NesuД‘enom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najvaЕҫnija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ДҚega ume da se "zakaДҚi" sa svojom suprugom.
VideДҮete kako se Bojan snaЕЎao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i zaЕЎto njegova lepЕЎa polovina kaЕҫe da je tu, prvenstveno, odliДҚan degustator.

Duhovit i ЕЎarmantan, Bojan se pokazao kao veseo, raspevan i zabavan domaДҮin Tijani DapДҚeviДҮ, Zorani PaviДҮ, Sanji VuДҚiДҮ, Borisu PingoviДҮu, Nigoru i Veljku KuzmanДҚeviДҮu koji je svojim komentarima zabavio i svoju ekipu i domaДҮine.


Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije

snippet.title: URANAK1 | O vakcinama, imunizaciji, merama | Mila AleДҚkoviДҮ | Goran VesiДҮ
snippet.description:
DobrodoЕЎli na zvaniДҚni YouTube kanal K1 TV-a!
вҶ“ вҶ“ вҶ“ Posetite naЕЎ sajt i naloge na druЕЎtvenim mreЕҫama:
K1TV WEB: https://bit.ly/K1TVsajt
K1TV Program: https://bit.ly/K1TVprogram
вң” FACEBOOK: https://bit.ly/K1TVFacebook 
рҹ“· INSTAGRAM: https://bit.ly/K1TVInstagram
вқҘ YOUTUBE: https://bit.ly/K1TVYouTube

Razonodite se uz muziДҚko-zabavni sadrЕҫaj domaДҮe produkcije najviЕЎeg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naЕЎe produkcije izdvajamo sledeДҮe emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokuЕЎavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Е ta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan StankoviДҮ, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost вҖңjedan na jedanвҖқ razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, вҖңna iglamaвҖқ zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
DrugaДҚija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaДҮe muziДҚke scene. SaznaДҮete ЕЎta drugi sluЕЎaju, ko je i zbog ДҚega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkriДҮete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog Еҫivota izvoД‘aДҚa sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne liДҚnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome priДҚaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica LeЕЎiДҮ i Ljubomir DorontiДҮ.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
GlumaДҚko-voditeljski par NataЕЎa AksentijeviДҮ i Predrag PeД‘a DamnjanoviДҮ vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima priДҚaju o zabavnim sadrЕҫajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim deЕЎavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoДҮ benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamiДҚan i upeДҚatljiv naДҚin.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, BoЕЎko JakovljeviДҮ i Aleksandra JeftanoviДҮ, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji ЕЎou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

"Top Lista"
DrugaДҚija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaДҮe muziДҚke scene. SaznaДҮete ЕЎta drugi sluЕЎaju, ko je i zbog ДҚega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkriДҮete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog Еҫivota izvoД‘aДҚa sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne liДҚnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome priДҚaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica LeЕЎiДҮ i Ljubomir DorontiДҮ.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
GlumaДҚko-voditeljski par NataЕЎa AksentijeviДҮ i Predrag PeД‘a DamnjanoviДҮ vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima priДҚaju o zabavnim sadrЕҫajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim deЕЎavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoДҮ benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamiДҚan i upeДҚatljiv naДҚin.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, BoЕЎko JakovljeviДҮ i Aleksandra JeftanoviДҮ, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji ЕЎou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

snippet.title: Najjednostavniji kolaДҚ na svetu a tako je dobar - Postan recept mera na ДҚaЕЎe
snippet.description:
Najjednostavniji kolaДҚ  na svetu koji svako moЕҫe da napravi jer je prejednostavan a ukus je boЕҫanstven. NaЕҫalost ne mogu da vam doДҚaram koliko je lepo mirisala kuhinja dok se pekao, jer je dovoljno samo da osetite miris i sve ДҮe vam biti jasno koliko je dobar i ukusan ovaj kolaДҚ. InaДҚe ovu pitu odnosno kolaДҚ moЕҫete praviti kao posnu ili mrsnu varijantu a razlika je jedino u tome da li ДҮete koristiti puter ili  margarin. Osim ЕЎto nije skup, ovaj najjednostavniji kolaДҚ na svetu ДҮe vas oДҚarati svojom jednostavnoЕЎДҮu i ukusom.

в—Ҹ SASTOJCI в—Ҹ
2 ДҚaЕЎe mekog braЕЎna Sentella tip 400
2 ДҚaЕЎe griza
1 ДҚaЕЎa ЕЎeДҮera
1 prstohvat soli
1 kesica (15 gr) praЕЎka za pecivo


900 gr zamrznutih viЕЎanja
malo manje od jedne ДҚaЕЎe ЕЎeДҮera
1 kaЕЎiДҚicu cimeta
pola ДҚaЕЎe ulja


Malo margarina ili putera ukoliko ne pravite posnu verziju.

de.title: Der einfachste Kuchen der Welt UNGLAUBLICH GESCHMACK
de.description:
Der einfachste Kuchen der Welt, den jeder machen kann, weil er zu einfach und der Geschmack gГ¶ttlich ist.
Leider kann ich Ihnen nicht sagen, wie gut die KГјche beim Backen gerochen hat.
denn alles was Sie tun mГјssen, ist es zu riechen und alles wird Ihnen klar sein, wie gut und lecker dieser Kuchen ist.
Dieser einfachste Kuchen der Welt ist nicht nur nicht teuer, sondern verzaubert Sie auch durch seine Einfachheit und seinen Geschmack.

Schalten Sie den Untertitel in Ihrer Sprache ein, indem Sie auf den CC in der rechten Ecke klicken

ZUTATEN
2 Tassen Sentella Weichmehl Typ 400
2 Tassen GrieГҹ

900 g gefrorene Kirschen
etwas weniger als eine Tasse Zucker

eine halbe Tasse Г–l


Ein wenig Margarine oder Butter

ru.title: РЎР°РјСӢР№ РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫР№ СӮРҫСҖСӮ РІ РјРёСҖРө Рё Рә СӮРҫРјСғ Р¶Рө РІРәСғСҒРҪСӢР№
ru.description:
РЎР°РјСӢР№ РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫР№ СӮРҫСҖСӮ РІ РјРёСҖРө, РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСӢР№ РјРҫР¶РөСӮ РҝСҖРёРіРҫСӮРҫРІРёСӮСҢ РәР°Р¶РҙСӢР№, РҝРҫСӮРҫРјСғ СҮСӮРҫ РҫРҪ СҒР»РёСҲРәРҫРј РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫР№, Р° РІРәСғСҒ РұРҫР¶РөСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪСӢР№. Рҡ СҒРҫР¶Р°Р»РөРҪРёСҺ, СҸ РҪРө РјРҫРіСғ РҝРҫРәР°Р·Р°СӮСҢ РІР°Рј, РәР°Рә РҝСҖРёСҸСӮРҪРҫ РҝР°С…Р»Рҫ РҪР° РәСғС…РҪРө РІРҫ РІСҖРөРјСҸ РІСӢРҝРөСҮРәРё, РҝРҫСӮРҫРјСғ СҮСӮРҫ РҙРҫСҒСӮР°СӮРҫСҮРҪРҫ РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫ РҝРҫРҪСҺС…Р°СӮСҢ, Рё РІР°Рј РІСҒРө РұСғРҙРөСӮ СҸСҒРҪРҫ, РҪР°СҒРәРҫР»СҢРәРҫ С…РҫСҖРҫСҲ Рё РІРәСғСҒРөРҪ СҚСӮРҫСӮ СӮРҫСҖСӮ. Р’ РҝСҖРҫСӮРёРІРҪРҫРј СҒР»СғСҮР°Рө РІСӢ РјРҫР¶РөСӮРө РҝСҖРёРіРҫСӮРҫРІРёСӮСҢ СҚСӮРҫСӮ РҝРёСҖРҫРі РёР»Рё РҝРёСҖРҫРі РәР°Рә РҪРөР¶РёСҖРҪСӢР№, СӮР°Рә Рё Р¶РёСҖРҪСӢР№, СҖР°Р·РҪРёСҶР° Р»РёСҲСҢ РІ СӮРҫРј, РұСғРҙРөСӮРө Р»Рё РІСӢ РёСҒРҝРҫР»СҢР·РҫРІР°СӮСҢ РјР°СҒР»Рҫ РёР»Рё РјР°СҖРіР°СҖРёРҪ. РӯСӮРҫСӮ СҒР°РјСӢР№ РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫР№ СӮРҫСҖСӮ РІ РјРёСҖРө РҪРө СӮРҫР»СҢРәРҫ РҪРө РҙРҫСҖРҫРіРҫР№, РҪРҫ Рё РҫСҮР°СҖСғРөСӮ СҒРІРҫРөР№ РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫСӮРҫР№ Рё РІРәСғСҒРҫРј.

РҳРқР“Р Р•Р”РҳР•РқРўР«
2 СҒСӮР°РәР°РҪР° РјСҸРіРәРҫР№ РјСғРәРё Sentella СӮРёРҝР° 400
2 СҒСӮР°РәР°РҪР° РјР°РҪРҪРҫР№ РәСҖСғРҝСӢ
1 СҒСӮР°РәР°РҪ СҒР°С…Р°СҖР°
1 СүРөРҝРҫСӮРәР° СҒРҫР»Рё
1 РҝР°РәРөСӮРёРә (15 Рі) СҖР°Р·СҖСӢС…Р»РёСӮРөР»СҸ


900 Рі Р·Р°РјРҫСҖРҫР¶РөРҪРҪРҫР№ РІРёСҲРҪРё

es.title: La tarta mГЎs sencilla del mundo y ademГЎs deliciosa
es.description:
El pastel mГЎs simple del mundo que cualquiera puede hacer porque es demasiado simple y el sabor es divino. Lamentablemente, no puedo mostrarte lo bien que olГӯa la cocina mientras se horneaba, porque basta con olerlo y todo te quedarГЎ claro lo bueno y delicioso que es este pastel. De lo contrario, puede hacer este pastel o pastel como una variante magra o grasosa, y la Гәnica diferencia es si usarГЎ mantequilla o margarina. AdemГЎs de no ser caro, este bizcocho mГЎs sencillo del mundo te encantarГЎ por su sencillez y sabor.

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #590 - Marko i Hambi
snippet.description:
https://www.facebook.com/XiaomiHrvatska

Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u srediЕЎnjoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo viЕЎe od 1000 puta.
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a sliДҚan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima moЕҫe izazvati i vibracija mobitela.
Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuДҮu melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.
Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogoД‘ena podruДҚja, a viЕЎe saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica 

Na crveni kauДҚ stiЕҫe jedan od najpopularnijih gostiju u Podcast Inkubatoru - poznati boksaДҚki i MMA trener, ali i legenda naЕЎih druЕЎtvenih mreЕҫa, Goran BabiДҮ - Hamby. On i Petrak ДҮe analizirati sve aktualno na borilaДҚkoj sceni, te ДҮe ekskluzivno najaviti i novi projekt koji bi od 1.5. trebao krenuti na kanalu Podcast Inkubatora

snippet.title: Emanet 154. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 154
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#GerГ§ekler

He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#GerГ§ekler

snippet.description:

-

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вҖ“ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вҖ“ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвҖӢ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вҖӢ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вҖӢ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вҖқ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вҖҷs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвҖҷve never seen them before.  ItвҖҷs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвҖҷs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вҖңKingвҖқ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вҖңAvengersвҖқ films, вҖңHotel RwandaвҖқ), Khris Davis (вҖңJudas and the Black Messiah,вҖқ TVвҖҷs вҖңAtlantaвҖқ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвҖҷs вҖңThe Walking Dead,вҖқ вҖңStar Trek: DiscoveryвҖқ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), Eric Bauza (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), and Zendaya (upcoming вҖңDune,вҖқ вҖңMalcolm & MarieвҖқ).

Lee (вҖңGirls Trip,вҖқ вҖңNight SchoolвҖқ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвҖҷs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вҖңSpider-Man: HomecomingвҖқ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вҖңWonder ParkвҖқ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вҖңThe MuleвҖқ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвҖҷs вҖңWhen They See UsвҖқ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вҖңEternalsвҖқ), editor Bob Ducsay (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңStar Wars Episode VIII вҖ“ The Last JediвҖқ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вҖңRampage,вҖқ вҖңWar for the Planet of the ApesвҖқ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вҖңGreenbook,вҖқ NetflixвҖҷs вҖңBridgertonвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вҖқ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Emanet 155. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 155 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 154. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 154 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвҖӢ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвҖҷs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвҖҷve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвҖҷs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвҖҷll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвҖҷs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.title: NAJLEPЕ I SLANI ROLAT/Toliko lagan za pojesti a i za napraviti/SpanaДҮ ili blitva/OduЕЎeviДҮe sve goste.
snippet.description:
Slani rolat od spanaДҮa i sira za ДҚas gotov. VaЕЎa trpeza ДҮe da zablista!
PISANI RECEPT: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/slani-rolat-od-spanaca-i-sira.html
- 150 gr. spanaДҮa ili blitve
- 5 jaja
- 5 kaЕЎika mleka
- 5 kaЕЎika ulja
- 100 gr. braЕЎna
- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica praЕЎka za pecivo
- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica soli
- biber
- 200 gr. kaДҚkavlja
Za premaz:
- 5 kaЕЎika kisele pavlake
- 1 kaЕЎika majoneza
- prstohvat soli
- 1 kaЕЎiДҚica kurkume (ako volite)

- perЕЎunov list, miroД‘ija za dekoraciju
180 C, 20 min, 30x25cm

RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

snippet.title: Е ta joЕЎ mogu da nam urade | Novi Sputnjik poredak
snippet.description:
вҖһNovi Sputnjik poredakвҖң otkriva kako razmiЕЎlja ЕЎef ruske diplomatije Sergej Lavrov.

ZaЕЎto s Amerikom viЕЎe nema ozbiljnog razgovora, a njena politika ipak nema ЕЎansi da uspe? Kako ministar inostranih poslova Ruske Federacije objaЕЎnjava Alijansino sve glasnije zveckanje oruЕҫjem i raketnim ЕЎtitovima dualne namene, i treba li zbog toga da se zabrinemo? Zbog ДҚega Kremlj ne veruje francuskom predsedniku Emanuelu Makronu?

O ovim pitanjima u emisiji вҖһNovi Sputnjik poredakвҖң razgovaraju Nikola VrziДҮ i njegovi gosti вҖ” dopisnik вҖһVeДҚernjih novostiвҖң iz Moskve Branko VlahoviДҮ i urednik u вҖһPoliticiвҖң Bojan Bilbija.

Za sve najvaЕҫnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naЕЎ sajt в–ә https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

ЕҪelite prvi da saznate vest, ne sumnjate u njenu taДҚnost i ispratite najbitnije dogaД‘aje u svetu koji utiДҚu i na naЕЎe Еҫivote? Interesuju vas miЕЎljenja najeminentnijih struДҚnjaka iz ЕЎirokog spektra oblasti i komentari na sve goruДҮe teme? PronaД‘ite to na Sputnjiku.

snippet.title: Isprobavamo TURSKU hranu!
snippet.description:
Danas gledate vlog koji smo snimali u Turskoj, ali kako Relja nije bio sa nama - doneli smo neke grickalice da cujemo i njegove utiske! :)


Ako ste propustili travel vlogove iz Turske:
TURSKA travel vlog: Assos, Apolonov grad i nekoliko konja :)  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xTSM5Dva81g
TURSKA travel vlog: TROJA i Istanbul! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8m1WnGNekWY



*Ukoliko ispod ovog videa nisu omoguceni komentari nisam ih ja ugasila. Jutjub se bori sa zlostavljanjem dece na ovoj platiformi, pa zato gase komentare na kanalima na kojima se pojavljuju deca. Nadam se da ce uskoro pronaci najbolji nacin da komentari opet budu omoguceni, a nasa deca sigurna. Hvala vam na razumevanju!

snippet.title: NeЕЎto novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ДҚas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskrЕЎnjih jaja na ovaj naДҚin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, neЕҫne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove neЕҫnije su mi draЕҫe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskrЕЎnja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAЕҪ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praЕЎkasti sok od jagode (ili rum punДҚa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaДҮi joЕЎ koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliДҚno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunД‘erom skinite peДҚat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ЕЎerpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaЕЎiДҚice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji Еҫelite. NiЕЎta ne meЕЎajte, sok ДҮe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neЕҫniju boju, rozu jaja drЕҫite kraДҮe u soku.

Istresite teДҚnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrЕЎinu da se osuЕЎe, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaЕҫite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

Е to se tiДҚe Еҫutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandЕҫe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirДҮetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moЕҫe bilo koji drugi.

Ispod videa kliknite na Like i Subscribe, komentarisite, napisite vase utiske, vase ideje, na koji nacin vi pripremate neko jelo, pecivo, kolac, tortu...
Svi komentari koji vredjaju autora i pratioce bice uklonjeni bez dalje rasprave. Ovo je kulturan youtub program, sa korisnim sadrzajem, ima i mladih i onih malo starijih tako da budimo ljubazni. I bez politike molim! Ima toliko tema o kojima mozemo pisati, u prvom planu su recepti iz nasih kuhinjica uz to se mozemo i druziti, caskati uz kaficu.

sr.title: NeЕЎto novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ДҚas! Easter eggs.
sr.description:
Farbanje uskrЕЎnjih jaja na ovaj naДҚin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, neЕҫne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove neЕҫnije su mi draЕҫe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskrЕЎnja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAЕҪ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praЕЎkasti sok od jagode (ili rum punДҚa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaДҮi joЕЎ koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliДҚno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunД‘erom skinite peДҚat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ЕЎerpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaЕЎiДҚice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji Еҫelite. NiЕЎta ne meЕЎajte, sok ДҮe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neЕҫniju boju, rozu jaja drЕҫite kraДҮe u soku.

Istresite teДҚnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrЕЎinu da se osuЕЎe, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaЕҫite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

Е to se tiДҚe Еҫutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandЕҫe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirДҮetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moЕҫe bilo koji drugi.

snippet.title: Ovna Brnju prozvali maneken s VlaЕЎiДҮa
snippet.description:
Iako ima tek neЕЎto viЕЎe od godinu dana ovan Brnjo vlasniЕЎtvo Hazira Sefera sa Gostilja na VlaЕЎiДҮu zbog svojih proporcija i ljepote dobio je nadimak najmlaД‘i maneken s VlaЕЎiДҮa. Hazir je stado od stotinjak ovaca naslijedio od svoga oca Smaila a uz joЕЎ krava porodica dobro Еҫivi od svoga rada. Sve ЕЎto proizvedu mesa, mlijeka i sira prodaju na kuДҮnom pragu. Smail je od ovaca otiЕЎao u vojsku a kada ima  vremena joЕЎ uvijek voli ДҚuvati ovce. "Kada ih ne ДҚuvam onda ih sanjam jer toliko volim ovce. Ovca ne da hrД‘i u kuДҮu" dodaje Smail. Pogledajte ovu neobiДҚnu priДҚu s VlaЕЎiДҮa i ovna koji stiЕҫe u stado nakon najmanje jedne decenije zahvaljujuДҮi odliДҚnoj genetici.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: KuruluЕҹ Osman 53. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
O, kГ¶mГјr karasДұ gГ¶zleriyle, gaza ve hГјrriyet ateЕҹini tutuЕҹturacaktДұ. 

AdДұ, ErtuДҹrul Gazi oДҹlu OsmanвҖҷdДұвҖҰ 

KaranlДұДҹДұn iГ§inde ona yol gГ¶steren вҖңaЕҹkвҖқ olduвҖҰ

Kan ve gГ¶zyaЕҹДұyla sulanan topraklarda, gГ¶k ekini gibi biГ§ilen; yedi gГ¶ДҹГј, yedi yeri, daДҹlarДұ, denizleri aЕҹacak bir milletin rГјyasДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ gГ¶rdГј.

GГјcГјnГј kДұlДұcДұndan deДҹil, вҖңaЕҹktanвҖқ aldДұвҖҰ ZorbalДұДҹa adaletle; kГ¶leliДҹe hГјrriyetle direnen, tarihin gГ¶rdГјДҹГј en bГјyГјk imparatorluДҹa adДұnДұ вҖңaЕҹklaвҖқ verdi.

72 milleti kДұran bozuk dГјzene karЕҹДұ baЕҹkaldДұrДұ, mazlumlarДұn sessiz Г§ДұДҹlДұДҹДұna umut, KuruluЕҹвҖҷun adДұ olduвҖҰ

KuruluЕҹ OsmanвҖҰ 400 Г§adДұrlДұk bir obadan, вҖңilahi aЕҹklaвҖқ kurulan bir cihan imparatorluДҹuna yГјrГјyГјЕҹГјn hikayesi.

Abone Olmak iГ§in ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

be.description:
РқР°РұР»С–Р¶Р°РөСҶСҶР° Р’СҸР»С–РәРҙР·РөРҪСҢ, СӮР°РјСғ РІРҫСҒСҢ РҝРөСҖСҲР°Рө Сһ РіСҚСӮСӢРј РіРҫРҙР·Рө РІС–РҙСҚР° РҝР° С„Р°СҖРұР°РІР°РҪРҪС– СҸРөРә. РӨР°СҖРұСғР№СҶРө СҸР№РәС– Р°СҖСӢРіС–РҪР°Р»СҢРҪСӢРј СҒРҝРҫСҒР°РұР°Рј РұРөР· РІСӢРәР°СҖСӢСҒСӮР°РҪРҪСҸ С…С–РјС–СҮРҪСӢС… СҖСҚСҮСӢРІР°Сһ, СҶР°Р»РәР°Рј РҪР°СӮСғСҖР°Р»СҢРҪР°. РҡР°Рұ СҸР№РәР° Р°СӮСҖСӢРјР°Р»Р° СӮР°РәС– СҚС„РөРәСӮ, Р»РөРҝСҲ Р·Р° СһСҒС‘ РІСӢРәР°СҖСӢСҒСӮРҫСһРІР°СҶСҢ РұРөР»Р°Рө, СӮР°РјСғ Сһ РҝР°СҮР°СӮРәСғ РІС–РҙСҚР° РІСӢ РјРҫР¶Р°СҶРө СһРұР°СҮСӢСҶСҢ, СҸРә Р°РҙРұСҸР»С–СҶСҢ Р·РІСӢСҮР°Р№РҪР°Рө Р¶РҫСһСӮР°Рө СҸР№РәР°.

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:
La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente. AffinchГ© l'uovo abbia questo effetto, ГЁ meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

INGREDIENTI PER SBIANCARE L'UOVO
500 ml di acqua
400 ml di aceto alcolico

INGREDIENTI PER VERNICIARE LE UOVA
80 g di tГЁ all'ibisco
1 cucchiaino di aceto (alcolico o vino)
acqua bollita
+ un filo d'olio per ricoprire

ro.title: VopsiИӣi ouДғ fДғrДғ substanИӣe chimice Г®n mod original - destul de natural / VopsiИӣi ouДғ de PaИҷte
ro.description:
PaИҷtele se apropie, aИҷa cДғ iatДғ primul videoclip pentru acest an pentru vopsirea ouДғlor. VopsiИӣi ouДғle Г®n modul original, fДғrДғ a folosi substanИӣe chimice, destul de natural. Pentru ca oul sДғ obИӣinДғ acest efect, cel mai bine este sДғ folosiИӣi albul, aИҷa cДғ la Г®nceputul videoclipului puteИӣi vedea cum sДғ albiИӣi un ou galben obiИҷnuit.

INGREDIENTE DE ALBITURARE A OUAUELOR
500 ml de apДғ
400 ml oИӣet alcoolic

INGREDIENTE PENTRU VOPSEA DE OUДӮ
80 g ceai de hibiscus
1 linguriИӣДғ de oИӣet (alcoolic sau vin)
apa fiarta
+ puИӣin ulei pentru acoperire

ar.title: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© 90 Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ 2
ar.description: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩҲЩ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩӮШөШ© "ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ" Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ¬Ш§ШІЩҒ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШ¬ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ ЩҲЩӮШөШ© "ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш©" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШӯЩғЩ… Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ШЁШІШ§ЩҲШ¬ ШӘШ№ЩҠШі Щ…Ш№ ШҙШ®Шө Щ„Ш§ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШЁЩӮЩү Ш§Щ„ШұШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№Ш§ Щ„ЩҮ. ШҘЩҶ ШӯШЁ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШ·ЩҶШЁЩҲЩ„ ЩҠЩғШӘШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШіЩ„Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩҶЩҒШөЩ„ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШӘШӯШ¶ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҢ ШіЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ…ШӘШӯШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШЁШұ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈШ¶ЩҶШ§. ЩҠШӘЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӯЩҠШҜ Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұЩҠЩӮШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш«ШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§. Щ„ЩҠШі ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҙЩҠШЎ Щ„ЩҶ ЩҠЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҮ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШӯШЁ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШЁШ§ ШЁЩ„Ш§ ЩҮЩҲШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ЩҮШ§. ШҘЩҶ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШӘЩү ЩҲЩ„ЩҲ ШЈШұШ§ШҜЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲШ§ ШӯШЁЩҮЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠШЎ ЩҒЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш© ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩӮШ§ Щ„ЩҮЩ…Ш§. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШәЩҠШұ Ш¬ШәШұШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШіШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 1970 ШҢ ШіЩҠШЁЩӮЩү ШұЩҮЩҠЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШіШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәЩ„ЩӮШ© ЩҲ ШӯШұЩҲШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ©.

snippet.title: Son Yaz 15. BГ¶lГјm 1. FragmanДұ | BaЕҹka Kollarda Teselli
snippet.description:
Son Yaz 15. BГ¶lГјm 1. FragmanДұ | BaЕҹka Kollarda Teselli

Д°dealist Cumhuriyet SavcДұsДұ Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yДұl Г¶nce hapse yolladДұДҹДұ organize suГ§ lideri SelГ§uk TaЕҹkДұnвҖҷdan (Arif PiЕҹkin) reddedemeyeceДҹi bir teklif alДұr. SelГ§uk TaЕҹkДұn, SavcДұ Selim KaraвҖҷnДұn bГјtГјn suГ§ Г¶rgГјtГјnГј Г§Г¶kertecek davasДұnda, tanДұklДұk yapmayДұ istemektedir. Ancak bunun iГ§in tek bir ЕҹartДұ vardДұr; oДҹlu AkgГјn GГ¶kalp TaЕҹkДұnвҖҷДұ (Alperen Duymaz) Selim KaraвҖҷnДұn bizzat korumasДұвҖҰ SuГ§ dГјnyasДұ iГ§inde bГјyГјmГјЕҹ, tehlikeli ve sorunlu gГ¶rГјnГјmГјnГјn ardДұnda duygusal bir genГ§ olan AkgГјn iГ§in bu kabul edilmesi gГјГ§ bir durumdur. Hayat beklemediДҹi bir yerden daha sДұnar SelimвҖҷi; Д°zmirвҖҷde Г§ocuklarДұ ile yaЕҹayan eЕҹi Canan (Funda EryiДҹit) boЕҹanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile iЕҹi arasДұnda kalan SavcДұ Kara, baЕҹ belasДұ olarak gГ¶rdГјДҹГј AkgГјnвҖҷГј ailesinin yanДұna Д°zmir ГҮeЕҹmeвҖҷde bulunan Adalet SitesiвҖҷne gГ¶tГјrmek zorunda kalДұr. SelimвҖҷin beklenmeyen misafiri AkgГјnвҖҷГјn geliЕҹi site sakinlerinin tГјm dengelerini altГјst edecek; EgeвҖҷde baЕҹlayan bu rГјzgГўr, herkesin hayatДұnДұ deДҹiЕҹtirecek bГјyГјk bir fДұrtДұnaya dГ¶nГјЕҹecektir.

OYUNCULAR: ALPEREN DUYMAZ, ALД° ATAY, FUNDA ERYД°ДһД°T, HAFSANUR SANCAKTUTAN, EMRE KARAYEL, SД°NAN TUZCU, ЕһEBNEM DГ–NMEZ, ARД°F PД°ЕһKД°N, SEZER KOГҮ, HALД°L BABГңR, YASEMД°N YAZICI, ERDEM ЕһANLI, YUNUS NARД°N, ATA NEDД°M ARMAN, SARP Д°KД°LER, CENGД°Z OKUYUCU

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...
